name: Bharat Wire Ropes Limited
summary: Bharat Wire Ropes Limited manufactures and sells steel wire ropes in India. It offers wires, wire ropes, stranded wires, and slings, as well as mechanically spliced slings, hand spliced slings, earth wires, stay wires, guy wires, and spiral strands for use in oil and gas, mining, fishing, ports and marine, elevator, power transmission, railways, construction, infrastructure, defense, crane manufacturing, and other industries. The company serves consumers, private clients, and defense segment clients, as well as for government and semi-government organizations. Bharat Wire Ropes Limited also exports its products to the United States, Singapore, Australia, South Africa, Kuwait, New Zealand, Vietnam, Bangladesh, and Nepal. The company was formerly known as Bharat Ropes Limited and changed its name to Bharat Wire Ropes Limited in July 1996. Bharat Wire Ropes Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Mumbai, India.
